TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ren'ai Itini i Nantou ko Ren'ai Siyang. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 1,219.39 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 909.39 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 201.17 km²), 14,966 ko tamdaw i Ren'ai Siyang, 4,643 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 12,526 a tamdaw, pakaala to 84%(Tayal, Seediq, Bunun) no polong no tamdaw. o Tayal, Seediq, Bunun ko sa'alomanay i Nantou. O kasaniyarona 16 ko cun, 24 ko niyaro' i Ren'ai Siyang. Alang sasi , Alang tongan , Alang pulan , Alang snuwing , Alang bwarung , Alang toda , Masitoban , Knaziy , Bukai , Malepa , Alang sadu , Alang busi , Alang truwan , Qatu , Alang nakahara , Alang gluban , Qalang kobah , Qalang bayi , Alang marosan , Qalang mb'ala , Alang paran , Alang ruku daya , Sima-un , Qalang bubun .
S.PHON: rənʡai itini i nanto~uo~u~u ko~u rənʡai sijaŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u *,***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u ***.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u ***.** km*), **,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i rənʡai sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u **,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(tajaɾ, səəɬ~ɮi*, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u tajaɾ, səəɬ~ɮi*, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i nanto~uo~u~u. o~u kasanijaro~una ** ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i rənʡai sijaŋ. aɾaŋ sasi , aɾaŋ to~uŋan , aɾaŋ po~u~uɾan , aɾaŋ sno~u~uwiŋ , aɾaŋ b~b~vwaro~u~uŋ , aɾaŋ to~uɬ~ɮa , masito~ub~b~van , kna*ij , b~b~vo~u~ukai , maɾəpa , aɾaŋ saɬ~ɮo~u~u , aɾaŋ b~b~vo~u~usi , aɾaŋ tro~u~uwan , *ato~u~u , aɾaŋ nakaħara , aɾaŋ *ɾo~u~ub~b~van , *aɾaŋ ko~ub~b~vaħ , *aɾaŋ b~b~vaji , aɾaŋ maro~usan , *aɾaŋ mb~b~vʡaɾa , aɾaŋ paran , aɾaŋ ro~u~uko~u~u ɬ~ɮaja , sima-o~u~un , *aɾaŋ b~b~vo~u~ub~b~vo~u~un .
S.FORM: Ren'ai Itini i Nantou ko Ren'ai Siyang. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 1,219.39 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 909.39 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 201.17 km²), 14,966 ko tamdaw i Ren'ai Siyang, 4,643 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 12,526 a tamdaw, pakaala to 84%(Tayal, Seediq, Bunun) no polong no tamdaw. o Tayal, Seediq, Bunun ko sa'alomanay i Nantou. O kasaniyarona 16 ko cun, 24 ko niyaro' i Ren'ai Siyang. Alang sasi , Alang tongan , Alang pulan , Alang snuwing , Alang bwarung , Alang toda , Masitoban , Knaziy , Bukai , Malepa , Alang sadu , Alang busi , Alang truwan , Qatu , Alang nakahara , Alang gluban , Qalang kobah , Qalang bayi , Alang marosan , Qalang mb'ala , Alang paran , Alang ruku daya , Sima-un , Qalang bubun .
S.PHON: rənʡai itini i nanto~uo~u~u ko~u rənʡai sijaŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u *,***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u ***.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u ***.** km*), **,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i rənʡai sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u **,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(tajaɾ, səəɬ~ɮi*, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u tajaɾ, səəɬ~ɮi*, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i nanto~uo~u~u. o~u kasanijaro~una ** ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i rənʡai sijaŋ. aɾaŋ sasi , aɾaŋ to~uŋan , aɾaŋ po~u~uɾan , aɾaŋ sno~u~uwiŋ , aɾaŋ b~b~vwaro~u~uŋ , aɾaŋ to~uɬ~ɮa , masito~ub~b~van , kna*ij , b~b~vo~u~ukai , maɾəpa , aɾaŋ saɬ~ɮo~u~u , aɾaŋ b~b~vo~u~usi , aɾaŋ tro~u~uwan , *ato~u~u , aɾaŋ nakaħara , aɾaŋ *ɾo~u~ub~b~van , *aɾaŋ ko~ub~b~vaħ , *aɾaŋ b~b~vaji , aɾaŋ maro~usan , *aɾaŋ mb~b~vʡaɾa , aɾaŋ paran , aɾaŋ ro~u~uko~u~u ɬ~ɮaja , sima-o~u~un , *aɾaŋ b~b~vo~u~ub~b~vo~u~un .
